# Riverside Cafe LLC — Accounting Records

## Business Overview

- **Entity**: Riverside Cafe LLC (single-member LLC, taxed as S-Corp)
- **Owner**: Maria and Jorge Gutierrez
- **EIN**: 93-XXXXXXX
- **Location**: 2815 NW Thurman Street, Portland, OR 97210
- **Industry**: Restaurant / cafe (breakfast, lunch, and coffee service)
- **Employees**: 14 (8 full-time, 6 part-time)
- **Fiscal year**: January 1 — December 31
- **Annual revenue (2025)**: $485,000
- **Projected revenue (2026)**: $540,000

## Accounting Setup

- **Software**: QuickBooks Online (Plus plan, $80/month)
- **Accounting method**: Accrual basis (switched from cash basis in January 2026 — see decisions.md)
- **Bank**: OnPoint Community Credit Union, business checking and savings accounts
- **Credit card**: Chase Ink Business Preferred (used for all vendor purchases, 3x points on dining supplies)
- **Payroll**: Gusto (Standard plan, $40/month + $6/employee/month = $124/month total)

## External Accountant

- **Firm**: Green & Associates CPAs
- **Contact**: Rachel Green, CPA
- **Phone**: (503) 555-0298
- **Email**: rgreen@greenassociatescpa.com
- **Services**: Monthly financial review, quarterly tax filings, annual tax return preparation, bookkeeping oversight
- **Annual fee**: $8,400 ($700/month retainer)
- Rachel has been the Gutierrez family's accountant since 2020. She recommended the switch to accrual accounting and the S-Corp election.

## Key Financial Metrics (2025)

- **Gross revenue**: $485,000
- **COGS (food, beverage)**: $145,500 (30% of revenue)
- **Gross profit**: $339,500 (70% margin)
- **Operating expenses**: $278,000
- **Net income before owner compensation**: $61,500
- **Owner salary (S-Corp reasonable compensation)**: $48,000
- **Distributions**: $13,500
